subcodes.first_line: O thou bird soaring in the firmament of thy Lord's love! Hearken unto the call of Him Who is wronged, and convey unto the people that which hath descended from heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر فی هوآء محبته ربک اسمع ندآء المظلوم و بلغ الناس ما نزل من سماء
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment
